assertion_results.text: Tasks target both 'trustify-backend' and 'trustify-ui' repositories with at least one task per repo
assertion_results.evidence: Tasks 1-3 target trustify-backend (each has '## Repository\ntrustify-backend'). Tasks 4-6 target trustify-ui (each has '## Repository\ntrustify-ui'). Three tasks per repo.

assertion_results.text: Backend tasks have lower task numbers than the frontend tasks that depend on them
assertion_results.evidence: Backend tasks are numbered 1, 2, 3. Frontend tasks are numbered 4, 5, 6. Task 4 (frontend) depends on Task 2 (backend). Task 5 depends on Task 4. Task 6 depends on Task 5. All backend tasks have lower numbers than frontend tasks that depend on them.

assertion_results.text: Frontend tasks reference Figma design context mentioning specific PatternFly components and visual specifications
assertion_results.evidence: Task 5 (SbomComparePage) references PatternFly Select with variant='typeahead', PatternFly Button with variant='primary', PatternFly Dropdown with variant='secondary', PatternFly ExpandableSection, PatternFly Badge with color varying by section (green/red/blue/yellow), PatternFly EmptyState with CodeBranchIcon, PatternFly Skeleton, PatternFly composable Table with sortable columns, and specific visual specs like diff section order, critical vulnerability row highlighting. Task 6 references PatternFly composable Table checkbox column using select composable transformer, PatternFly Button with variant='secondary'.

assertion_results.text: At least one frontend task explicitly depends on a backend task in its Dependencies section
assertion_results.evidence: Task 4 (frontend-api-layer.md) has '## Dependencies\n- Depends on: Task 2 — Backend comparison service and endpoint (API contract must be finalized)'. Task 2 is a backend task.

assertion_results.text: Frontend tasks reference paths from repo-frontend.md; backend tasks reference paths from repo-backend.md
assertion_results.evidence: Backend tasks reference paths from repo-backend.md: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/compare.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/compare.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/compare.rs, tests/api/sbom_compare.rs, etc. Frontend tasks reference paths from repo-frontend.md: src/api/models.ts, src/api/rest.ts, src/hooks/useSbomComparison.ts, src/pages/SbomComparePage/, src/routes.tsx, src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.tsx, tests/mocks/handlers.ts, src/components/SeverityBadge.tsx, etc.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 tasks contain '## Description', '## Acceptance Criteria', and '## Test Requirements' sections. Task 1: Description (line 4), Acceptance Criteria (line 29), Test Requirements (line 36). Task 2: Description (line 4), Acceptance Criteria (line 38), Test Requirements (line 48). Task 3: Description (line 4), Acceptance Criteria (line 29), Test Requirements (line 34). Task 4: Description (line 4), Acceptance Criteria (line 34), Test Requirements (line 40). Task 5: Description (line 4), Acceptance Criteria (line 34), Test Requirements (line 46). Task 6: Description (line 4), Acceptance Criteria (line 27), Test Requirements (line 34).

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the corresponding mock repository structure manifests (repo-backend.md or repo-frontend.md), not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: Backend tasks reference existing paths from repo-backend.md: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs (line 41 repo-backend.md), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/mod.rs (line 45), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (line 48), tests/api/ directory (line 110). New files are created within existing directories from the manifest (e.g., modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/compare.rs in the model/ dir, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/compare.rs in the service/ dir). Frontend tasks reference existing paths: src/api/models.ts (line 23 repo-frontend.md), src/api/rest.ts (line 25), src/hooks/ directory (line 27), src/pages/ directory, src/routes.tsx (line 53), src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.tsx (line 33), tests/mocks/handlers.ts (line 59), tests/mocks/fixtures/ directory (line 60). New files are within existing directories. All modified files exist in the manifests.

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1: References modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/details.rs, specific derives 'Clone, Debug, Serialize, Deserialize, ToSchema', PackageSummary from modules/fundamental/src/sbom/../package/model/summary.rs, AdvisorySummary from modules/fundamental/src/advisory/model/summary.rs. Task 2: References modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs, PackageService::list(), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/../package/service/mod.rs, AdvisoryService::list() from modules/fundamental/src/advisory/service/advisory.rs, entity::sbom_package, entity::sbom_advisory, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/get.rs, common/src/error.rs::AppError, common/src/db/query.rs. Task 3: References tests/api/sbom.rs patterns, assert_eq!(resp.status(), StatusCode::OK). Task 4: References src/api/rest.ts::fetchSboms(), src/api/client.ts Axios instance, src/hooks/useSbomById.ts pattern, useQuery with specific query key ['sbom-comparison', leftId, rightId]. Task 5: References PatternFly Select with variant='typeahead', useSboms from src/hooks/useSboms.ts, useSbomComparison from src/hooks/useSbomComparison.ts, SeverityBadge from src/components/SeverityBadge.tsx, React Router useSearchParams(), src/routes.tsx. Task 6: References src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.tsx, FilterToolbar from src/components/FilterToolbar.tsx, tests/mocks/handlers.ts, useNavigate() with specific path pattern.
